headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

headline: Quarterra and PGIM Celebrate Groundbreaking at Alexandria Crossing Apartments
summary: Quarterra, an industry-leading multifamily development and investment management firm, and PGIM, the global investment management business of Prudential Financial, Inc. and the second-largest real estate investment manager in the world, celebrated the commencement of construction on Alexandria Crossing at their groundbreaking ceremony earlier this month.
